description_long: This arcade game cabinet is a classic upright machine with a predominantly black front and vibrant side panels featuring retro artwork. The front panel includes a large display screen, a marquee with colorful graphics, and a control panel equipped with two joysticks and several buttons, suggesting a two-player setup. The side panels are decorated with a stylized illustration of a futuristic tank firing a laser into a starry sky, surrounded by geometric shapes and target motifs in red, yellow, and blue. The cabinet is constructed from sturdy materials, likely wood or MDF, with a hard, smooth finish and some metallic elements for the control panel and coin slot. The marquee at the top displays the game's title in bold, colorful letters against a cosmic background. The overall design is both functional and visually striking, making it a recognizable fixture in arcades or urban entertainment spaces.
description: A classic upright arcade game cabinet with black front, vibrant retro side artwork, and a control panel featuring two joysticks and multiple buttons. The top marquee displays colorful game-themed graphics.
description_view_0: The rear view shows a plain, solid black panel with no visible artwork or interactive features.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the colorful side panel artwork depicting a futuristic tank firing a laser, with geometric and cosmic motifs.
description_view_2: The front view displays the screen, marquee, control panel with joysticks and buttons, and the coin slot area.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, featuring the same vibrant tank and laser artwork on a white background.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, curved, medium size with a visible bezel around the screen
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two joysticks and multiple buttons arranged side-by-side for two players, with colored button caps and clear player separation
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features colorful, cosmic-themed graphics with the game title in bold letters and a starry sky background
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display vibrant artwork of a futuristic tank firing a laser into a starry sky, with geometric and target motifs in red, yellow, and blue on a white background
